question: Assam state ka naam confirm karo, un states ki list se jinke paas district information record hai.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_state.state_name
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Assam';
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_state.state_name
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Assam';

question: Bihar state ke andar sabhi districts ki ek alphabetical list provide karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_district.district_name
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Bihar'
ORDER BY dim_district.district_name ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_district.district_name
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Bihar'
ORDER BY dim_district.district_name ASC;

question: Assam aur Andaman and Nicobar Islands ke states mein sabhi districts list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam' OR s.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands';
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam' OR s.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands';
error: Mismatch (Order matters: False). Gold count: 38. Pred count: 38.

question: Har state ke liye districts ki ginti pata karo, aur state ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME;
predicted_sql:
SELECT s.state_name, COUNT(d.district_id) AS district_count
FROM dim_state s
LEFT JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
GROUP BY s.state_id, s.state_name
ORDER BY s.state_name ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT s.state_name, COUNT(d.district_id) AS district_count
FROM dim_state s
LEFT JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
GROUP BY s.state_id, s.state_name
ORDER BY s.state_name ASC;

question: India ke saare districts list karo, aur unke state ke naam bhi batado.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T3.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India';
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_district.district_name, dim_state.state_name
FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
JOIN dim_country ON dim_state.country_id = dim_country.country_id
WHERE dim_country.country_name ILIKE 'India';

FROM dim_district
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sab sub-districts ke names aur area types list karo, alphabetically sort karna area type aur name ke hisaab se.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA ASC, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN dim_state dsta ON dd.state_id = dsta.state_id
WHERE dsta.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
ORDER BY ds.type_of_area, ds.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.sub_district_name, ds.type_of_area
FROM dim_sub_district ds
JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN dim_state dsta ON dd.state_id = dsta.state_id
WHERE dsta.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
ORDER BY ds.type_of_area, ds.sub_district_name;

question: Har state ke liye, area type ke hisaab se sub-districts ki sankhya ka breakdown do, state name ke alphabetical order mein sort karo aur phir highest count ke basis pe.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT s.state_name, sd.type_of_area, COUNT(*) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district sd
JOIN dim_district d ON sd.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY s.state_name, sd.type_of_area
ORDER BY s.state_name ASC, sub_district_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT s.state_name, sd.type_of_area, COUNT(*) AS sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district sd
JOIN dim_district d ON sd.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY s.state_name, sd.type_of_area
ORDER BY s.state_name ASC, sub_district_count DESC;

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo, alphabetically sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT s.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN dim_state st ON d.state_id = st.state_id
WHERE st.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND s.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
ORDER BY s.sub_district_name ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT s.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN dim_state st ON d.state_id = st.state_id
WHERE st.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND s.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
ORDER BY s.sub_district_name ASC;

WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'Nicobars'
ORDER BY dim_state.state_name ASC;

SELECT dim_state.state_name, dim_district.district_name
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
WHERE dim_state.state_name ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR dim_district.district_name ILIKE 'Nicobars'

question: Top 5 states kaun se hain jinke paas sabse zyada rural sub-districts hain?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS rural_sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district
JOIN dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY rural_sub_district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_state.state_name, COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) AS rural_sub_district_count
FROM dim_sub_district
JOIN dim_district ON dim_sub_district.district_id = dim_district.district_id
JOIN dim_state ON dim_district.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY rural_sub_district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 5. Pred count: 5.

question: Assam mein aise districts ke naam batayein jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' EXCEPT SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar'
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
AND d.district_name NOT IN (
    SELECT d2.district_name
    FROM dim_district d2
    JOIN dim_state s2 ON d2.state_id = s2.state_id
    WHERE s2.state_name ILIKE 'Bihar'
);
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
AND d.district_name NOT IN (
    SELECT d2.district_name
    FROM dim_district d2
    JOIN dim_state s2 ON d2.state_id = s2.state_id
    WHERE s2.state_name ILIKE 'Bihar'
);

question: Assam ke districts ke naam batao jisme ek se zyada rural sub-district ho, alphabetical order mein sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' AND T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
  AND sd.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 1
ORDER BY d.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
  AND sd.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.district_name
HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 1
ORDER BY d.district_name;

question: Assam ke top paanch districts ke naam batao jo ek se zyada sub-district rakhte hain, aur unhe reverse alphabetical order mein sort karo.

predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dim_sub_district sd
    WHERE sd.district_id = d.district_id
    GROUP BY sd.district_id
    HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 1
)
ORDER BY d.district_name DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Assam'

    SELECT 1

    WHERE sd.district_id = d.district_id
    GROUP BY sd.district_id
    HAVING COUNT(sd.sub_district_id) > 1
)

question: Saal dar saal allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronological order mein.

question: Saal ke hisaab se, rural aur urban dono areas mein total allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronologically order karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.YEAR_VALUE, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T4 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T4.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T4.TYPE_OF_AREA IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T2.YEAR_VALUE ORDER BY T2.YEAR_VALUE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_year.year_value, dim_sub_district.type_of_area, SUM(fact_outpatient_services.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_allopathic_attendance
FROM fact_outpatient_services
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_outpatient_services.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month ON fact_outpatient_services.month_id = dim_month.month_id
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id
GROUP BY dim_year.year_value, dim_sub_district.type_of_area
ORDER BY dim_year.year_value ASC;

FROM fact_outpatient_services
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_outpatient_services.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month ON fact_outpatient_services.month_id = dim_month.month_id
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id

question: Woh sub-districts pata karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui thi, lekin 2021 mein aisi koi attendance nahi thi.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

      AND fos.sub_district_id = dsd.sub_district_id

)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_outpatient_services fos2
    JOIN dim_month dm2 ON fos2.month_id = dm2.month_id
    JOIN dim_year dy2 ON dm2.year_id = dy2.year_id

);

question: Sub-districts ko identify karo jo 2021 mein rural aur urban dono areas mein outpatient services report kiye hain.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA) = 2
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area
FROM dim_sub_district sd
JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos ON sd.sub_district_id = fos.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month m ON fos.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE y.year_value = 2021
  AND sd.type_of_area IN ('Urban', 'Rural')
  AND fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic IS NOT NULL;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.sub_district_name, sd.type_of_area
FROM dim_sub_district sd
JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos ON sd.sub_district_id = fos.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month m ON fos.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE y.year_value = 2021
  AND sd.type_of_area IN ('Urban', 'Rural')
  AND fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic IS NOT NULL;

question: Rural sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui hai, lekin un sub-districts ko exclude karo jinke urban areas mein bhi usi saal reported attendance ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district sd
JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos ON sd.sub_district_id = fos.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month m ON fos.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE sd.type_of_area = 'Rural'
  AND y.year_value = 2022
  AND sd.district_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT sd2.district_id
    FROM dim_sub_district sd2
    JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos2 ON sd2.sub_district_id = fos2.sub_district_id
    JOIN dim_month m2 ON fos2.month_id = m2.month_id
    JOIN dim_year y2 ON m2.year_id = y2.year_id
    WHERE sd2.type_of_area = 'Urban'
      AND y2.year_value = 2022
  );
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.sub_district_name
FROM dim_sub_district sd
JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos ON sd.sub_district_id = fos.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month m ON fos.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE sd.type_of_area = 'Rural'
  AND y.year_value = 2022
  AND sd.district_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT sd2.district_id
    FROM dim_sub_district sd2
    JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos2 ON sd2.sub_district_id = fos2.sub_district_id
    JOIN dim_month m2 ON fos2.month_id = m2.month_id
    JOIN dim_year y2 ON m2.year_id = y2.year_id
    WHERE sd2.type_of_area = 'Urban'
      AND y2.year_value = 2022
  );
error: Mismatch (Order matters: False). Gold count: 2613. Pred count: 40.
